meaning: adj.螟夂ｧ咲畑騾皮噪,螟夂岼譬勰噪
examples: Somehow we have managed to make the bedroom a multipurpose room.
Parvis and his colleagues have been working on their multipurpose lens since 2004.
The del has a high collar, is often brightly colored, comes with a multipurpose sash.
Nissan produces the Micra and Sunny as well as the Evalia multipurpose vehicle at the facility.
The company checked and found stores that still had Complete MoisturePLUS Multipurpose solution on their shelves.
